Rules.InvariantScript: ["All","Draft","Submitted","PMO Review","In Assessment","PMO Consolidation","Programme Meeting","Pre-SG Distribution","SG Review","Post-Meeting Edits","Approved","Deferred","Rejected","Closed"]

Switch(ThisItem.CRStatus.Value,
  "Draft", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  "Submitted", RGBA(110,140,176,1),
  "PMO Review", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "In Assessment", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "PMO Consolidation", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "Programme Meeting", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "Pre-SG Distribution", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "SG Review", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "Post-Meeting Edits", RGBA(243,156,18,1),
  "Approved", RGBA(39,174,96,1),
  "Deferred", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  "Rejected", RGBA(192,57,43,1),
  "Closed", RGBA(149,165,166,1),
  RGBA(31,55,100,1)
)

If(
  ThisItem.AIPSGTargetDate < Today() And Not(ThisItem.CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]),
  RGBA(192, 57, 43, 1),
  DateDiff(Today(), ThisItem.AIPSGTargetDate, TimeUnit.Days) <= 14,
  RGBA(243, 156, 18, 1),
  RGBA(117, 117, 117, 1)
)

Sort(
  Filter(CRRequests,
    (IsBlank(txtSearchVCS.Text) Or txtSearchVCS.Text in Title Or txtSearchVCS.Text in CRNumber),
    (ddlStatusVCS.Selected.Value = "All" Or CRStatus.Value = ddlStatusVCS.Selected.Value),
    (ddlProgrammeVCS.Selected.Value = "All Programmes" Or ProgrammeName = ddlProgrammeVCS.Selected.Value),
    (IsBlank(ddlAIPSGVCS.Selected) Or ddlAIPSGVCS.Selected.MeetingDate = AIPSGTargetDate),
    (Not(IsDraft) Or Originator.Email = User().Email Or gblIsPMO)
  ),
  AIPSGTargetDate, SortOrder.Ascending
)

Set(gblDetailCR, ThisItem);
Navigate('CR Detail Screen', ScreenTransition.None)

/*
  View CRs Screen — OnVisible
  Purpose: Refresh the CR list on every visit so status changes are current.
  Author:  IAG Tech Developer
  Date:    07 Apr 2026
*/
// Reset any stale form error from a previous submission attempt.
Set(gblFormError, "")
